entries.name: Haiku
entries.structure: 3 lines; 5-7-5 syllable pattern traditional; nature theme; seasonal reference kigo; cutting word
entries.conventions: Present tense; concrete imagery; juxtaposition; no rhyme; moment of awareness
entries.output_characteristics: Brief, concentrated; nature focus; seasonal; imagistic; minimalist

entries.name: Sonnet
entries.structure: 14 lines; iambic pentameter; rhyme schemes Shakespearean ABAB CDAB EFEF GG or Petrarchan ABBAABBA CDECDE/CDCDCD
entries.conventions: Turn or volta at line 9 or 13; argument development; lyric meditation; love or philosophical themes
entries.output_characteristics: Formal, structured; romantic or philosophical; sophisticated rhyme; volta crucial

entries.name: Limerick
entries.structure: 5 lines; AABBA rhyme; anapestic meter; lines 1,2,5 longer; lines 3,4 shorter
entries.conventions: Humorous tone; often bawdy; bouncy rhythm; place name in line 1; punchline in line 5
entries.output_characteristics: Comic, irreverent; strict form; musical rhythm; brief joke structure

entries.name: Free Verse
entries.structure: No fixed meter or rhyme; variable line length; natural speech rhythms; organic form
entries.conventions: Line breaks for emphasis; rhythm through repetition; imagery focus; concrete language
entries.output_characteristics: Flexible, modern; natural speech; visual on page; freedom within discipline

entries.name: Blank Verse
entries.structure: Unrhymed iambic pentameter; continuous lines; no stanza breaks required
entries.conventions: Elevated subjects; epic or dramatic; enjambment common; sustained meditation
entries.output_characteristics: Formal but unrhymed; Shakespearean; serious tone; flexible within meter

entries.name: Villanelle
entries.structure: 19 lines; 5 tercets plus 1 quatrain; ABA rhyme for tercets, ABAA for quatrain; two refrains
entries.conventions: Refrains alternate in tercets, both in final quatrain; obsessive themes; circular structure
entries.output_characteristics: Complex, recursive; obsessive repetition; musical; technically demanding

entries.name: Sestina
entries.structure: 39 lines; 6 stanzas of 6 lines plus 1 tercet; end-word repetition in pattern; no rhyme
entries.conventions: 6 end-words rotate in specific pattern; all 6 in final tercet; mathematical precision
entries.output_characteristics: Intricate, puzzle-like; recursive; non-rhyming; challenging form

entries.name: Ode
entries.structure: Lyric poem of praise; elaborate stanza forms; elevated language; sustained meditation
entries.conventions: Pindaric, Horatian, or irregular; apostrophe common; serious subject; public or private
entries.output_characteristics: Formal celebration; elevated diction; extended meditation; passionate

entries.name: Elegy
entries.structure: Lament or meditation on death; variable form; serious tone; reflective
entries.conventions: Mournful tone; memory and loss; consolation or acceptance; elegiac couplets classical
entries.output_characteristics: Somber, reflective; death meditation; memorial; philosophical

entries.name: Epic
entries.structure: Long narrative poem; heroic deeds; elevated style; grand scope; invocation
entries.conventions: Starts in medias res; epic similes; catalogs; divine intervention; vast historical scope
entries.output_characteristics: Long, ambitious; heroic; national or cultural scope; formal elevated language

entries.name: Ballad
entries.structure: Narrative poem; quatrains; ABCB or ABAB rhyme; simple language; refrain common
entries.conventions: Story-telling; dialogue; repetition; incremental development; folk origins
entries.output_characteristics: Musical, story-driven; folk tradition; simple language; often tragic

entries.name: Acrostic
entries.structure: First letters of lines spell word or message; variable line length; any subject
entries.conventions: Vertical word usually name or theme; puzzle element; may rhyme or not
entries.output_characteristics: Playful, hidden message; visual element; teaching tool; word game

entries.name: Cinquain
entries.structure: 5 lines; syllable pattern 2-4-6-8-2 or word pattern 1-2-3-4-1; imagistic
entries.conventions: Brief, imagistic; no rhyme required; concentrated image; didactic origins
entries.output_characteristics: Short, precise; image-focused; unrhymed; teaching form

entries.name: Tanka
entries.structure: 5 lines; 5-7-5-7-7 syllable pattern; Japanese form; two-part structure
entries.conventions: Turn after line 3; personal emotion; nature imagery; no seasonal word required
entries.output_characteristics: Haiku extension; emotional; personal; Japanese classical

entries.name: Ghazal
entries.structure: Couplets; AA BA CA DA rhyme; refrain after rhyme; radif and qafia; Arabic/Persian origin
entries.conventions: Independent couplets; poet's name in final couplet; love or mystical themes
entries.output_characteristics: Musical, recursive; Middle Eastern; romantic or mystical; refrain-driven

entries.name: Pantoum
entries.structure: Interlocking quatrains; ABAB rhyme; lines 2 and 4 become 1 and 3 of next stanza; circular
entries.conventions: Lines 1 and 3 of final stanza are lines 2 and 4 of first; dreamy, recursive
entries.output_characteristics: Hypnotic repetition; Malaysian origin; circular; dream-like

entries.name: Terza Rima
entries.structure: ABA BCB CDC pattern; interlocking tercets; iambic; Dante's form
entries.conventions: Propulsive forward movement; concluding couplet; serious philosophical themes
entries.output_characteristics: Chain-linked; driving rhythm; Italian; philosophical depth

entries.name: Prose Poem
entries.structure: Poetic language in prose form; no line breaks; paragraph units; poetic density
entries.conventions: Concentrated language; imagery rich; poetic devices but prose appearance
entries.output_characteristics: Hybrid form; prose disguise; poetic intensity; modern innovation

entries.name: Concrete/Visual Poetry
entries.structure: Shape on page reflects meaning; visual arrangement essential; typography as art
entries.conventions: Form equals content; visual reading required; spatial arrangement; often minimalist text
entries.output_characteristics: Visual art; shape poetry; experimental; image-text fusion

entries.name: Rondeau
entries.structure: 15 lines; 3 stanzas 5-3-5-2; ABaAabAB format; rentrement partial refrain
entries.conventions: French form; playful or light; rentrement from opening words; strict rhyme
entries.output_characteristics: Musical, circular; French; light verse; refrain playfulness

entries.output_characteristics: History or humanities; footnote-heavy; formal; detailed citations

entries.name: IEEE Format
entries.structure: Two-column; numbered citations [1]; references section; specific font and spacing requirements
entries.conventions: Numbered citations in text [1]; alphabetical references; technical and engineering focus; concise
entries.output_characteristics: Engineering or technical; numbered citations; two-column; concise

entries.name: Dialogue Script
entries.structure: Character names; spoken lines; minimal stage directions; conversational flow; natural speech patterns
entries.conventions: Character name followed by colon or on separate line; natural speech; subtext; realistic interruptions
entries.output_characteristics: Conversational, realistic; character-driven; natural speech; minimal description

entries.name: MEDDIC Sales Qualification Framework
entries.structure: Qualify opportunities using Metrics, Economic Buyer, Decision Criteria, Decision Process, Identify Pain, Champion
entries.conventions: For each opportunity quantify customer metrics, identify economic buyer, understand decision criteria, map decision process, validate pain points, develop champion relationship

entries.name: Value Selling Methodology
entries.structure: Current State Cost -> Future State Value -> Implementation Investment -> Net Benefit -> Payback Period
entries.conventions: Document current costs, calculate future value, estimate implementation costs, compute ROI, show payback timeline, create compelling business case

entries.name: Sales Pipeline Stages Framework
entries.structure: Lead -> Qualified -> Discovery -> Proposal -> Negotiation -> Closed-Won or Closed-Lost with entry and exit criteria for each
entries.conventions: Document stage definitions, set entry and exit criteria, define activities per stage, assign probability percentages, track stage velocity

entries.name: Account-Based Selling Blueprint
entries.structure: Research -> Stakeholder Map -> Value Hypothesis -> Multi-Thread Engagement -> Business Case -> Executive Alignment
entries.conventions: Deep account research, map org chart and stakeholders, develop tailored value proposition, engage multiple contacts, build executive relationships

entries.name: Demo Framework - Before/After/Bridge
entries.structure: Current Pain -> Desired Outcome -> Solution Capabilities
entries.conventions: Open with customer pain, show ideal end state, demonstrate how product bridges gap, use customer-specific examples

entries.name: Objection Handling Framework
entries.structure: Listen -> Validate -> Clarify -> Address -> Confirm
entries.conventions: Do not interrupt, show empathy, ask clarifying questions, respond directly, verify satisfaction with answer

entries.name: Sales Forecasting Model
entries.structure: Weighted pipeline using stage probabilities to calculate forecast
entries.conventions: Assign probabilities by stage, weight all opportunities, sum weighted values, adjust for rep accuracy, track versus actual

entries.name: Territory Planning Matrix
entries.structure: Potential Value x Strategic Fit using a 9-box grid for prioritization
entries.conventions: Score accounts on potential and fit, plot on matrix, allocate time proportionally, define coverage strategy per quadrant

entries.name: Sales Onboarding 30-60-90 Plan
entries.structure: Month 1 product and company knowledge, Month 2 shadowing and practice, Month 3 quota ramp-up with support
entries.conventions: Build week-by-week plan, assign training modules, define shadowing assignments, create practice opportunities, design progressive quota ramp

entries.name: Win-Loss Analysis Framework
entries.structure: Collect decision factors, competitor comparison, buying process, pricing perception, relationship quality -> Identify patterns -> Adjust strategy
entries.conventions: Interview decision-makers, document feedback, categorize win and loss reasons, identify trends, update sales approach

entries.name: Buyer Persona Template
entries.structure: Demographics -> Job and Responsibilities -> Goals and Challenges -> Information Sources -> Buying Process -> Decision Criteria
entries.conventions: Research target customers, document demographics, map responsibilities, identify pain points, understand research habits, note buying triggers

entries.name: Content Marketing Funnel
entries.structure: TOFU awareness -> MOFU consideration -> BOFU decision
entries.conventions: Create content for each stage, map to buyer journey, optimize for conversion, measure stage progression

entries.name: Campaign Brief Template
entries.structure: Objective -> Target Audience -> Key Message -> Channels -> Timeline -> Budget -> Success Metrics -> Creative Requirements
entries.conventions: Define clear goals, specify audience segments, craft core message, select channels, set dates, allocate budget, establish KPIs

entries.name: Brand Positioning Statement
entries.structure: For target customer who has need, product is a category that provides unique benefit. Unlike competitors, we offer differentiation
entries.conventions: Define target precisely, articulate need, position in category, state unique benefit, call out competitors, highlight difference

entries.name: Growth Experiment Template
entries.structure: Hypothesis -> Experiment Design -> Metrics -> Run -> Analyze -> Decision
entries.conventions: Form testable hypothesis, design minimal experiment, define success metrics, run test, analyze results, scale or kill

entries.name: Marketing Funnel Metrics Framework
entries.structure: Awareness -> Interest -> Consideration -> Intent -> Purchase
entries.conventions: Define metrics per stage, set conversion goals, track drop-off points, optimize weak areas, measure end-to-end

entries.name: Customer Journey Map Template
entries.structure: Stages -> Touchpoints -> Customer Actions -> Emotions -> Pain Points -> Opportunities
entries.conventions: Define journey stages, list all touchpoints, document customer actions, note emotional states, identify friction, find improvement opportunities

entries.name: Marketing Channel ROI Model
entries.structure: Investment -> Leads Generated -> Conversion Rate -> Revenue -> Cost per Acquisition -> ROI -> LTV:CAC
entries.conventions: Track spend by channel, measure leads, calculate conversion, attribute revenue, compute CAC, calculate ROI, compare to LTV

entries.name: Launch Plan Framework
entries.structure: Pre-Launch -> Launch Week -> Post-Launch
entries.conventions: Build anticipation, coordinate channels, execute launch day, maintain momentum, measure results, iterate

entries.name: ABM Program Blueprint
entries.structure: Select Accounts -> Research Insights -> Personalized Content -> Multi-Channel Engagement -> Sales Handoff -> Measure Account Engagement
entries.conventions: Identify target accounts, gather intelligence, create custom content, execute coordinated outreach, warm transfer to sales, track engagement

entries.name: Product Requirements Document Template
entries.structure: Problem Statement -> User Stories -> Requirements -> Success Metrics -> Technical Considerations -> Dependencies -> Timeline
entries.conventions: Define problem clearly, write user stories, prioritize requirements, set measurable goals, note technical needs, list dependencies, estimate timeline

entries.name: RICE Prioritization Framework
entries.structure: Score = Reach x Impact x Confidence divided by Effort
entries.conventions: Estimate users reached, rate impact, assign confidence, estimate effort, calculate scores, prioritize

entries.name: Product Roadmap Template
entries.structure: Now -> Next -> Later -> Future
entries.conventions: Place initiatives in timeframes, show themes not dates, include goals per period, update quarterly, communicate broadly

entries.name: User Story Format
entries.structure: As a user type, I want action so that benefit. Acceptance Criteria: Given context, when action, then outcome
entries.conventions: Identify user persona, define desired action, state value or benefit, write clear acceptance criteria, estimate story points

entries.name: Product-Market Fit Survey
entries.structure: Ask how users would feel if they could no longer use the product and target more than 40 percent very disappointed
entries.conventions: Survey active users, track very disappointed percentage, segment by user type, identify power users, improve weak segments

entries.name: Feature Sunset Process
entries.structure: Analyze Usage -> Announce Deprecation -> Migration Path -> Support Period -> Remove Feature -> Validate
entries.conventions: Review usage data, communicate timeline, provide alternatives, support transition, execute removal, confirm no impact

entries.name: Beta Testing Program
entries.structure: Recruit -> Onboard -> Collect Feedback -> Iterate -> Graduate -> Measure
entries.conventions: Select diverse beta users, provide clear instructions, gather structured feedback, fix issues, release generally, track success

entries.name: Product Metrics Dashboard
entries.structure: Acquisition -> Activation -> Engagement -> Retention -> Revenue -> Referral
entries.conventions: Define metric for each stage, instrument tracking, build dashboard, set targets, review weekly, drive improvements

entries.name: Competitive Analysis Framework
entries.structure: Feature Matrix -> Pricing Comparison -> Positioning Analysis -> Strengths and Weaknesses -> Opportunities and Threats
entries.conventions: Map competitor features, compare pricing, analyze messaging, assess advantages, identify gaps to exploit

entries.name: Design Sprint Process
entries.structure: Monday Map -> Tuesday Sketch -> Wednesday Decide -> Thursday Prototype -> Friday Test
entries.conventions: Define challenge, generate solutions, choose direction, build prototype, test with users, decide next steps

entries.name: Standard Operating Procedure Template
entries.structure: Purpose -> Scope -> Roles -> Procedure -> References -> Version Control
entries.conventions: State objective, define boundaries, assign responsibilities, document steps with screenshots, link resources, track versions

entries.name: Process Mapping SIPOC
entries.structure: Suppliers -> Inputs -> Process Steps -> Outputs -> Customers
entries.conventions: Identify suppliers, list inputs, map process flow, define outputs, identify customers, document handoffs

entries.name: Kaizen Event Framework
entries.structure: Current State -> Root Cause -> Solutions -> Implement -> Validate
entries.conventions: Map current process, identify waste, find root causes, brainstorm improvements, implement changes, measure impact

entries.name: Capacity Planning Model
entries.structure: Demand Forecast -> Available Capacity -> Gap Analysis -> Options -> Implementation Plan
entries.conventions: Project demand, calculate capacity, identify shortfall, evaluate solutions, choose approach, execute plan

entries.name: Vendor Evaluation Matrix
entries.structure: Criteria -> Weight -> Score Vendors -> Calculate Weighted Score -> Decide
entries.conventions: Define evaluation criteria, assign importance weights, score each vendor, calculate totals, select winner

entries.name: Quality Assurance Checklist Template
entries.structure: Pre-work Verification -> In-process Checks -> Final Review -> Sign-off -> Documentation
entries.conventions: List requirements, define checkpoints, specify criteria, assign reviewers, maintain records

entries.name: Incident Response Playbook
entries.structure: Detect -> Assess -> Contain -> Resolve -> Document -> Learn
entries.conventions: Identify issue, evaluate severity, limit impact, fix problem, record details, conduct post-mortem

entries.name: Business Continuity Plan Structure
entries.structure: Risk Assessment -> Critical Functions -> Recovery Strategies -> Emergency Contacts -> Testing Schedule
entries.conventions: Identify threats, prioritize functions, define recovery procedures, maintain contact lists, test regularly

entries.name: SLA Definition Template
entries.structure: Service Description -> Performance Metrics -> Target Levels -> Measurement Methods -> Penalties or Credits -> Review Cadence
entries.conventions: Define service scope, specify metrics, set targets, document measurement, establish consequences, schedule reviews

entries.name: Root Cause Analysis - 5 Whys
entries.structure: Problem Statement -> Why -> Why -> Why -> Why -> Why -> Root Cause -> Corrective Action
entries.conventions: State problem clearly, ask why five times, identify root cause, define corrective action, implement, verify

entries.name: 3-Statement Financial Model
entries.structure: Revenue Assumptions -> Income Statement -> Balance Sheet -> Cash Flow Statement -> Integrated Links
entries.conventions: Build revenue drivers, create P&L, model balance sheet, link cash flow, ensure balance, add scenarios

entries.name: Unit Economics Model
entries.structure: Revenue per Unit -> Variable Costs -> Contribution Margin -> CAC -> LTV -> LTV:CAC Ratio -> Payback Period
entries.conventions: Calculate revenue per unit, sum variable costs, compute margin, measure CAC, estimate LTV, assess ratios

entries.name: Budget Template Structure
entries.structure: Revenue Plan -> COGS -> Operating Expenses -> CapEx -> Cash Flow -> Variance Analysis
entries.conventions: Forecast revenue, plan costs, budget by function, allocate capital, project cash, track actual versus budget

entries.name: Cash Flow Forecast - 13 Week
entries.structure: Beginning Cash -> Collections -> Disbursements -> Net Cash Flow -> Ending Cash
entries.conventions: Start with current cash, project receipts, estimate payments, calculate net flow, identify shortfalls, plan financing

entries.name: Investment ROI Analysis
entries.structure: Initial Investment -> Annual Cash Flows -> Discount Rate -> NPV -> IRR -> Payback Period -> Decision Criteria
entries.conventions: Document investment, project cash flows, determine discount rate, calculate NPV and IRR, assess payback, make decision

entries.name: Scenario Planning Model
entries.structure: Base Case -> Optimistic Case -> Pessimistic Case -> Key Assumptions -> Sensitivity Analysis -> Contingency Plans
entries.conventions: Model realistic scenario, create upside case, model downside, document assumptions, test sensitivities, prepare responses

entries.name: Break-Even Analysis Framework
entries.structure: Fixed Costs -> Variable Cost per Unit -> Price per Unit -> Break-even Units
entries.conventions: Sum fixed costs, calculate variable cost, set price, compute break-even volume, assess feasibility

entries.name: Variance Analysis Report
entries.structure: Budget -> Actual -> Variance -> Explanation -> Action Plan
entries.conventions: Compare budget to actual, calculate differences, explain significant variances, define corrective actions

entries.name: Working Capital Optimization
entries.structure: Days Sales Outstanding -> Days Inventory Outstanding -> Days Payable Outstanding -> Cash Conversion Cycle
entries.conventions: Measure DSO, calculate DIO, track DPO, compute CCC, identify improvement areas, implement changes

entries.name: Investor Pitch Deck Structure
entries.structure: Problem -> Solution -> Market -> Business Model -> Traction -> Competition -> Team -> Financials -> Ask
entries.conventions: Cover pain point, product, market size, revenue model, metrics, competition, team, projections, funding needs

entries.name: Competency-Based Interview Guide
entries.structure: Role Competencies -> Behavioral Questions -> Scoring Rubric -> Evaluation Form -> Calibration Process
entries.conventions: Define competencies, write STAR questions, create scoring guide, document feedback, calibrate across interviewers

entries.name: Performance Review Template
entries.structure: Self-Assessment -> Manager Assessment -> Goal Achievement -> Competency Ratings -> Development Plan -> Compensation Discussion
entries.conventions: Employee reflection, manager evaluation, measure goal progress, rate competencies, identify growth areas, determine compensation

entries.name: Compensation Band Structure
entries.structure: Job Leveling -> Market Benchmarking -> Band Creation -> Positioning Guidelines -> Review Cycle
entries.conventions: Level roles, gather market data, create salary ranges, define positioning philosophy, review annually

entries.name: 90-Day Onboarding Plan
entries.structure: Week 1 Orientation -> Month 1 Role Fundamentals -> Month 2 Expanding Scope -> Month 3 Full Contribution
entries.conventions: Welcome and setup, core training, shadowing, increasing responsibility, regular check-ins, formal 90-day review

entries.name: 9-Box Talent Grid
entries.structure: Performance x Potential for talent assessment and development
entries.conventions: Rate performance, assess potential, plot employees, identify high potentials, plan development, address underperformance

entries.name: Career Ladder Framework
entries.structure: Levels -> Scope -> Impact -> Skills -> Behaviors -> Typical Tenure
entries.conventions: Define career levels, specify scope per level, describe expected impact, list required skills, note behaviors, indicate progression time

entries.name: Employee Engagement Survey Design
entries.structure: Engagement Drivers -> Question Bank -> Survey Design -> Administration -> Analysis -> Action Planning
entries.conventions: Identify drivers, write questions, design survey, distribute, analyze results, create action plans, communicate changes

entries.name: Succession Planning Matrix
entries.structure: Critical Roles -> Current Incumbents -> Ready Now Successors -> Ready in 1-2 Years -> Development Plans
entries.conventions: Identify key positions, name current holders, identify immediate backups, note future candidates, create development plans

entries.name: Diversity and Inclusion Roadmap
entries.structure: Baseline Metrics -> Goals -> Initiatives -> Measurement -> Accountability
entries.conventions: Measure current state, set targets, launch programs, track progress, hold leaders accountable

entries.name: Exit Interview Framework
entries.structure: Reason for Leaving -> Role Satisfaction -> Manager Relationship -> Culture Feedback -> Suggestions -> Themes Analysis
entries.conventions: Ask open questions, document responses, identify patterns, share insights with leadership, implement improvements

entries.name: Strategic Planning Process
entries.structure: Analysis -> Choices -> Plan -> Execution -> Review
entries.conventions: Conduct situation analysis, make strategic choices, document plan, assign ownership, track progress, review quarterly

entries.name: SWOT Analysis Framework
entries.structure: Strengths + Weaknesses + Opportunities + Threats -> Strategic Implications -> Action Items
entries.conventions: List internal and external factors, derive insights, define strategic actions

entries.name: Porter's Five Forces Analysis
entries.structure: Competitive Rivalry -> Supplier Power -> Buyer Power -> Threat of Substitutes -> Threat of New Entrants -> Industry Attractiveness
entries.conventions: Assess each force, rate intensity, evaluate overall industry attractiveness, identify strategic implications

entries.name: Business Model Canvas
entries.structure: Customer Segments -> Value Propositions -> Channels -> Customer Relationships -> Revenue Streams -> Key Resources -> Key Activities -> Key Partners -> Cost Structure
entries.conventions: Map all nine blocks, identify interdependencies, test assumptions, iterate model

entries.name: OKR Framework
entries.structure: Objective -> Key Results
entries.conventions: Set ambitious objectives, define measurable key results, align across organization, track progress, review quarterly

entries.name: Market Entry Strategy
entries.structure: Market Assessment -> Entry Mode -> Go-to-Market Plan -> Resource Requirements -> Risk Mitigation
entries.conventions: Analyze target market, choose entry approach, plan launch, allocate resources, identify and mitigate risks

entries.name: M&A Evaluation Framework
entries.structure: Strategic Fit -> Financial Model -> Cultural Alignment -> Integration Complexity -> Risk Assessment -> Valuation -> Decision
entries.conventions: Assess strategic value, build financial model, evaluate culture fit, plan integration, identify risks, determine valuation

entries.name: Scenario Planning Template
entries.structure: Identify Key Uncertainties -> Create Scenarios -> Analyze Implications -> Develop Strategies -> Monitor Indicators
entries.conventions: List uncertainties, develop plausible scenarios, assess impact, create response strategies, track signals

entries.name: Competitive Positioning Map
entries.structure: Identify 2 Key Dimensions -> Plot Competitors -> Identify White Space -> Choose Position -> Execute Strategy
entries.conventions: Select relevant axes, map competitors, find gaps, position offering

entries.name: Innovation Portfolio Management
entries.structure: Core 70 percent -> Adjacent 20 percent -> Transformational 10 percent
entries.conventions: Categorize initiatives, allocate resources, manage portfolio mix, balance risk and return, review regularly

entries.name: Customer Health Score Model
entries.structure: Product Usage + Support Engagement + Relationship Strength + Business Outcomes = Health Score
entries.conventions: Define metrics, weight dimensions, calculate scores, set thresholds, trigger interventions

entries.name: Customer Onboarding Journey
entries.structure: Welcome -> Setup -> First Value -> Expansion -> Advocacy
entries.conventions: Map stages, define success criteria, create content and touchpoints, measure time-to-value, optimize bottlenecks

entries.name: Quarterly Business Review Template
entries.structure: Progress Review -> Value Delivered -> Usage Analytics -> Roadmap Preview -> Expansion Opportunities -> Next Steps
entries.conventions: Prepare customer-specific data, show ROI, present usage insights, preview future features, identify expansion, agree actions

entries.name: Churn Prevention Playbook
entries.structure: Early Warning Signals -> Risk Assessment -> Intervention Strategy -> Execution -> Follow-up -> Resolution
entries.conventions: Monitor health indicators, identify at-risk accounts, choose intervention, execute, track outcome

entries.name: Expansion Revenue Framework
entries.structure: Identify Whitespace -> Build Business Case -> Present Recommendation -> Trial or Proof -> Close Expansion -> Ensure Adoption
entries.conventions: Analyze account opportunities, quantify value, recommend solutions, enable trial, negotiate terms, onboard expansion

entries.name: NPS Program Design
entries.structure: Survey Design -> Distribution -> Categorize -> Follow-up -> Close Loop -> Act on Insights
entries.conventions: Create survey, send to customers, calculate NPS, reach out, address feedback, drive improvements

entries.name: Customer Advocacy Program
entries.structure: Identify Advocates -> Engage -> Enable -> Recognize -> Nurture
entries.conventions: Find promoters, build relationships, provide opportunities, show appreciation, maintain engagement

entries.name: Renewal Process Workflow
entries.structure: 120 days Review -> 90 days Engage -> 60 days Propose -> 30 days Negotiate -> Close -> Celebrate
entries.conventions: Assess account health, initiate conversation, present renewal terms, handle objections, secure commitment, thank customer

entries.name: Customer Segmentation Model
entries.structure: High Value High Touch -> High Value Tech Touch -> Growing Scaled -> SMB Self-Service
entries.conventions: Segment customers by value and need, define service model per segment, allocate resources, deliver appropriate level

entries.name: Voice of Customer Program
entries.structure: Collect -> Analyze -> Prioritize -> Act -> Communicate -> Measure Impact
entries.conventions: Gather feedback systematically, synthesize insights, prioritize improvements, implement changes, close loop, track results

entries.name: Contract Review Checklist
entries.structure: Parties -> Scope -> Terms -> Payment -> IP Rights -> Liability -> Termination -> Dispute Resolution -> Signatures
entries.conventions: Verify parties, confirm scope, check terms, validate pricing, protect IP, limit liability, review exit clauses, confirm process

entries.name: Compliance Program Framework
entries.structure: Risk Assessment -> Policies -> Controls -> Training -> Monitoring -> Auditing -> Remediation
entries.conventions: Identify requirements, create policies, implement controls, train employees, monitor compliance, audit, fix gaps

entries.name: Data Privacy Impact Assessment
entries.structure: Data Mapping -> Risk Identification -> Impact Analysis -> Mitigation Measures -> Documentation -> Approval
entries.conventions: Map data flows, identify privacy risks, assess impact, design safeguards, document assessment, obtain sign-off

entries.name: IP Portfolio Management
entries.structure: Invention Disclosure -> Evaluation -> Filing Decision -> Prosecution -> Maintenance -> Enforcement
entries.conventions: Capture innovations, assess value, decide protection strategy, file applications, pay maintenance fees, defend rights

entries.name: Risk Register Template
entries.structure: Risk Description -> Category -> Likelihood -> Impact -> Score -> Owner -> Mitigation -> Status
entries.conventions: Identify risks, categorize, rate probability and severity, assign owners, define mitigations, track status

entries.name: Regulatory Change Management
entries.structure: Monitor -> Assess Impact -> Plan Response -> Implement -> Validate -> Document
entries.conventions: Track regulatory changes, evaluate impact, develop plan, execute changes, verify compliance, maintain records

entries.name: Audit Preparation Checklist
entries.structure: Scope Definition -> Document Gathering -> Internal Review -> Gap Remediation -> Audit Execution -> Follow-up
entries.conventions: Understand scope, collect evidence, conduct dry run, fix issues, support auditors, address findings

entries.name: Board Meeting Package
entries.structure: Agenda -> CEO Report -> Financial Update -> Strategic Initiatives -> Risk Review -> Decisions Needed -> Executive Session
entries.conventions: Set agenda, prepare materials, distribute in advance, present key items, facilitate discussion, document decisions

entries.name: Dispute Resolution Process
entries.structure: Assess Claim -> Gather Facts -> Evaluate Options -> Choose Strategy -> Execute -> Document
entries.conventions: Understand dispute, collect evidence, weigh alternatives, select approach, implement strategy, record outcome

entries.name: Ethics Violation Response
entries.structure: Report -> Investigate -> Document -> Decide -> Act -> Communicate -> Prevent Recurrence
entries.conventions: Receive complaint, investigate fairly, record findings, determine consequences, take action, improve controls

entries.name: Digital Transformation Roadmap
entries.structure: Current State -> Vision -> Capability Gaps -> Initiatives -> Sequencing -> Metrics -> Governance
entries.conventions: Assess maturity, define target state, identify gaps, design initiatives, prioritize sequence, set KPIs, establish governance

entries.name: Technology Selection Framework
entries.structure: Requirements -> Vendor Research -> Demo or POC -> Evaluation Matrix -> TCO Analysis -> Decision -> Implementation
entries.conventions: Define needs, identify vendors, conduct trials, score against criteria, calculate total cost, select solution, plan rollout

entries.name: Data Governance Framework
entries.structure: Data Catalog -> Quality Standards -> Stewardship Model -> Access Controls -> Lifecycle Management -> Compliance
entries.conventions: Inventory data assets, define quality rules, assign stewards, control access, manage retention, ensure compliance

entries.name: ML Model Development Lifecycle
entries.structure: Problem Definition -> Data Collection -> Feature Engineering -> Model Training -> Validation -> Deployment -> Monitoring
entries.conventions: Define use case, gather data, create features, train models, validate performance, deploy, monitor drift

entries.name: Cloud Migration Strategy
entries.structure: Assessment -> Prioritization -> Migration Approach -> Execution -> Optimization
entries.conventions: Inventory applications, prioritize migration order, choose strategy per app, execute migration, optimize cost and performance

entries.name: Cybersecurity Framework
entries.structure: Identify -> Protect -> Detect -> Respond -> Recover
entries.conventions: Inventory assets, implement access controls, monitor threats, build incident response, ensure continuity

entries.name: API Design Standards
entries.structure: RESTful Conventions -> Versioning -> Authentication -> Error Handling -> Documentation -> Rate Limiting
entries.conventions: Follow REST principles, version APIs, secure endpoints, return meaningful errors, document thoroughly, implement limits

entries.name: CRM Implementation Plan
entries.structure: Requirements -> Platform Selection -> Data Migration -> Customization -> Integration -> Training -> Adoption
entries.conventions: Define needs, choose CRM, migrate data, configure system, connect tools, train users, drive adoption

entries.name: Analytics Dashboard Design
entries.structure: User Needs -> Metrics Selection -> Data Sources -> Visualization -> Interactivity -> Performance -> Iteration
entries.conventions: Understand audience, choose KPIs, connect data, design visualizations, enable filtering, optimize speed, improve from feedback

entries.name: Agile Development Framework
entries.structure: Sprint Planning -> Daily Standups -> Development -> Review -> Retrospective -> Iterate
entries.conventions: Plan sprint backlog, sync daily, build and test, demo to stakeholders, reflect and improve, repeat two-week cycles
